calendar.matters:
Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and tracks the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
